title: Futures: What is a key characteristic of a futures contract compared...
summary: Distinguish futures from forward contracts based on standardization and exchange trading.
prompt: What is a key characteristic of a futures contract compared to a forward contract?

options.text: Futures contracts are standardized and traded on exchanges
A futures contract traded on an exchange

solution: Futures contracts are standardized and traded on exchanges, which provides more liquidity compared to forward contracts that are customized and traded over-the-counter (OTC). Futures also have daily settlements that mitigate counterparty risk. Understanding the differences helps market participants choose the right instrument for their needs.
